pool.baseline:
hey can u help me out? i saw this article about the new Energy Future Act theyre debating in the state legislature and i didnt really get the gist of it. can u give me a quick summary of the pros and cons of the bill?

here is the text: 
"The proposed Energy Future Act seeks to redistribute state energy subsidies, moving $500 million annually from coal-fired power plants to new solar and wind farm developments. Supporters of the bill argue that this shift is essential to meet state climate goals and foster a modern clean energy economy. However, critics express concern over the immediate economic impact on coal-dependent communities, citing potential job losses and rising energy costs during the transition period. The bill also includes tax incentives for homeowners installing solar panels."
